mapper.sql: id, username, email, password_hash, phone, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, username, email, password_hash, phone, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
username = #{username}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET deleted_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
